blockers_found_by_pre_readiness_audit: FULL construction-label trial ordering depended on the Monte Carlo chain even though FULL selection was numerically invariant
no single production analysis entrypoint validated mixed method-context rows and atomically wrote every registered Stage-C result table
synthetic scenarios S12, S13, and S15 were declarative rows rather than executable production-path checks
the initial analysis lock therefore did not bind a complete result-freeze implementation

repair_scope.FULL_trial_order: canonical frozen construction-view order independent of chain
repair_scope.FULL_selection: deterministic with identical score and sample digests across chains
repair_scope.production_entrypoint: one validated method-context analysis and atomic result-freeze path
repair_scope.result_tables: all registered evaluation inference robustness taxonomy and final-manifest outputs
repair_scope.synthetic_entrypoint: the same production result-freeze path with injected synthetic rows
repair_scope.S12: ranking association cannot substitute for a failed Q1 decision
repair_scope.S13: top-k cannot substitute for a failed Q1 decision
repair_scope.S15: Monte Carlo chain rows are rejected as target-cluster scientific rows
